# Changelog

Track LOLA OS updates from beginner features to advanced enhancements.

## v1.0.0 (November 5, 2025)
- Initial release.
- Core components: Agents, tools, chains, libs.
- CLI for scaffolding/execution.
- 24 examples with onboarding READMEs.
- Full documentation for all levels.

## Upcoming
- v1.1.0: Monitoring and guardrails (V2 features).
- v2.0.0: RAG, evaluations, multi-chain expansions.

Subscribe to GitHub for updates.
